violations.text: Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (Ice Machine) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice was voluntarily disposed of. Machine was cleaned and sanitized during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/11/2025

Proper cooling methods were not used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. Per interview of staff, Cachupa was placed hot in the refrigerator in containers greater than four inches deep. Cachupa was just placed in fridge. Cachupa was placed in 2 inch pans and placed in freezer for rapid cooling. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/11/2025
The dish machine located in the bar area was not in good repair. Equipment must be maintained in good condition. New Violation. Correct By: 09/18/2025

The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the quat sanitizing solution for the 3 bay. The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the dish machine. New Violation. Correct By: 09/13/2025
